actual_title: Online Algorithms and Decisions Under Arrival

cards.title: Information at Decision Time
cards.governance_note: Record what was known, unknown, predicted, and committed when each arrival decision was made.

cards.title: Arrival Model and Thresholds
cards.governance_note: Document arrival assumptions, thresholds, queue policies, and prediction-error handling.

cards.title: Fairness, Fallback, and Governance
cards.governance_note: Test order sensitivity, queue fairness, reversibility, fallback, appeal, and communication of future-blind limits.
